# STORAGE ACCOUNT (from Linked service name)
storage_account = "pinsstodwdevuks9h80mb"

# CONTAINER (top-level folder under the storage account)
container = "horizon-migration-poc"

# FOLDER where LLAttrData.csv lives
folder = "MPESC-EXTRACT"

# INPUT FILE
input_file = "LLAttrData.csv"

# OUTPUT FOLDER (already exists – good)
output_folder = "LLAttr"

# DefID -> friendly file/table name
DEFID_TO_TABLE = {
    # ======================
    # NSIP
    # ======================
    12361638: "NSIP_Case",
    12361642: "NSIP_Applicant",
    12361641: "NSIP_Key_Dates",
    12361640: "NSIP_Fees",
    12361645: "NSIP_Advice",
    12361644: "NSIP_Document",

    # ======================
    # DNS
    # ======================
    28937821: "DNS_Case",
    28937822: "DNS_Dates",

    # ======================
    # Core Case
    # ======================
    95498: "Case",
    95499: "Case_Dates",
    15810101: "Case_Dates_Environment",
    95500: "Case_Document_Dates",
    95501: "Case_Involvement",
    95502: "Case_Site",
    24636544: "Case_Specific_Object",

    # ======================
    # Fees / Finance
    # ======================
    95504: "DPA_Fee",
    95505: "DPA_Fee_Refund",
    95493: "Abeyance",

    # ======================
    # Applications
    # ======================
    95494: "Advert_Application",
    95495: "Advertisement",
    95496: "Appeal_Ground",
    95497: "CAS_Type",
    95509: "Planning_Application",
    95510: "Planning_Obligation_Application",
    15809661: "Purchase_Notice",

    # ======================
    # Documents / Events
    # ======================
    95503: "Document",
    95506: "Event",
    95507: "Despatch_Alert",
    95508: "Notice",
    15169115: "COSMO_Document",
    17224065: "Horizon_Publication",
    95511: "Scanned_Batch",
    95512: "Template_Task_List",

    # ======================
    # Judicial Review / Legal
    # ======================
    12361643: "JR_Dates",
    19674254: "Secretary_Of_State_Decision",
    15809004: "High_Court_Specialist_Casework",

    # ======================
    # Community / Levy
    # ======================
    21889077: "Community_Infrastructure_Levy",
    15809441: "Recharge",

    # ======================
    # Coastal / Environmental
    # ======================
    15809442: "Coastal_Access",

    # ======================
    # Knowledge / Content
    # ======================
    18122884: "Knowledge_Document",

    # ======================
    # Modification / Orders
    # ======================
    15809003: "Modification",

    # ======================
    # s62A (Section 62A)
    # ======================
    12351021: "s62A_Application_Basic_Data",
    12351020: "s62A_Key_Dates",
    12351022: "s62A_Extended_Data",
    12351018: "s62A_Fees",
    12351019: "s62A_Hearing",
    12351017: "s62A_DCLG_Return",
    12351014: "s62A_Application_Document_Data",
    12351015: "s62A_Case_Officers",
    12351016: "s62A_Comment",
    12351023: "s62A_Publish_Documents",
    12351024: "s62A_Statutory_Consultees",

    # ======================
    # DCLG (Call-in / Orders / Directions etc.)
    # ======================
    24636659: "DCLG",
    24636660: "DCLG_Allotment_Disposal",
    24636661: "DCLG_Article_4_Direction",
    24636662: "DCLG_Business_Commercial_NSIP",
    24636663: "DCLG_Conservation_Area_Demolition",
    24636664: "DCLG_Consultation_Direction",
    24636665: "DCLG_Correspondence",
    24636666: "DCLG_CPO",
    24636667: "DCLG_EIA",
    24636668: "DCLG_Green_Belt_Act_1938",
    24636669: "DCLG_Ground_10A",
    24636670: "DCLG_Habitats_Regulations",
    24636671: "DCLG_High_Court",
    24636672: "DCLG_Lee_Valley",
    24636673: "DCLG_Less_Than_Best",
    24636674: "DCLG_Listed_Building_Consent_Private",
    24636675: "DCLG_Order",
    24636676: "DCLG_Rare",
    24636677: "DCLG_Recovered_Case",
    24636678: "DCLG_Recovered_NSIP",
    24636679: "DCLG_Request_To_Intervene",
    24636680: "DCLG_Right_To_Contest",
    24636681: "DCLG_S100_104",
    24636682: "DCLG_Section_19_Land_Acquisition",
    24636683: "DCLG_Document",
}

def defid_to_folder(defid: int) -> str:
    name = DEFID_TO_TABLE.get(int(defid), f"DefID_{defid}")
    return f"{name}_{defid}"

input_path  = f"abfss://{container}@{storage_account}.dfs.core.windows.net/{folder}/{input_file}"
output_base = f"abfss://{container}@{storage_account}.dfs.core.windows.net/{folder}/{output_folder}"

print("INPUT :", input_path)
print("OUTPUT:", output_base)

df_raw = (
    spark.read
    .option("header", True)
    .option("inferSchema", False)   # keep as strings first (safer for big messy CSVs)
    .option("multiLine", False)
    .option("escape", '"')
    .option("quote", '"')
    .csv(input_path)
)

print("Rows:", df_raw.count())
print("Cols:", len(df_raw.columns))
df_raw.printSchema()
df_raw.show(5, truncate=False)

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

# quick glance at key columns
df_raw.select("DefID","AttrID","KeyID","EntryNum","ParentKeyID").show(10, truncate=False)

# distinct DefIDs
df_raw.select("DefID").distinct().orderBy("DefID").show(50, truncate=False)

dfv = (
    df.withColumn(
        "Value",
        F.coalesce(
            F.col("ValStr").cast("string"),
            F.col("ValLong").cast("string"),
            F.col("ValDate").cast("string"),
            F.col("ValReal").cast("string"),
            F.col("ValInt").cast("string"),
        )
    )
    .withColumn("Value", F.when(F.trim(F.col("Value")) == "", None).otherwise(F.col("Value")))
)

dfv.select("DefID","AttrID","KeyID","EntryNum","ParentKeyID","Value","ValInt","ValReal","ValDate","ValStr","ValLong").show(20, truncate=False)

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

dfv_nonnull = (
    df
    .withColumn(
        "Value",
        F.coalesce(
            F.col("ValStr").cast("string"),
            F.col("ValLong").cast("string"),
            F.col("ValDate").cast("string"),
            F.col("ValReal").cast("string"),
            F.col("ValInt").cast("string"),
        )
    )
    .withColumn("Value", F.when(F.trim(F.col("Value")) == "", None).otherwise(F.col("Value")))
    .filter(F.col("Value").isNotNull())
)

print("Rows with Value:", dfv_nonnull.count())
dfv_nonnull.select("DefID","AttrID","KeyID","EntryNum","ParentKeyID","Value").show(10, truncate=False)

test_defid = 12361638

df_test = dfv_nonnull.filter(F.col("DefID") == test_defid)

print("Rows for DefID", test_defid, ":", df_test.count())

df_test.select(
    "DefID","AttrID","KeyID","EntryNum","ParentKeyID","Value"
).show(30, truncate=False)

# What attributes exist for this table?
df_test.select("AttrID").distinct().orderBy("AttrID").show(200, truncate=False)

pivot_index = ["DefID", "KeyID", "ParentKeyID", "EntryNum", "CustomID"]

df_pivot = (
    df_test
    .select(*(pivot_index + ["AttrID","Value"]))
    .groupBy(*pivot_index)
    .pivot("AttrID")
    .agg(F.first("Value"))
)

print("Pivot rows:", df_pivot.count())
print("Pivot cols:", len(df_pivot.columns))
df_pivot.show(10, truncate=False)

out_path = f"{output_base}/{defid_to_folder(test_defid)}"

(
    df_pivot
    .repartition(1)   # makes one csv file; remove later for big scale
    .write.mode("overwrite")
    .option("header", True)
    .csv(out_path)
)

print("Wrote:", out_path)

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

dfv_nonnull.filter(F.col("DefID").isNull()).select("DefID","AttrID","KeyID","Value").show(20, truncate=False)
print("Null DefID rows:", dfv_nonnull.filter(F.col("DefID").isNull()).count())

defids = [
    r["DefID"] for r in (
        dfv_nonnull
        .filter(F.col("DefID").isNotNull())
        .select(F.col("DefID").cast("int").alias("DefID"))
        .distinct()
        .collect()
    )
]

print("DefIDs found (non-null):", len(defids))
print("First 20 DefIDs:", sorted(defids)[:20])

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

defids = [
    r["DefID"] for r in (
        dfv_nonnull
        .filter(F.col("DefID").isNotNull())
        .select(F.col("DefID").cast("int").alias("DefID"))
        .distinct()
        .collect()
    )
]

print("DefIDs found (non-null):", len(defids))
print("Min/Max DefID:", min(defids), max(defids))
print("First 20:", sorted(defids)[:20])

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

pivot_index = ["DefID","KeyID","ParentKeyID","EntryNum","CustomID"]

for d in sorted(defids):
    df_d = dfv_nonnull.filter(F.col("DefID") == F.lit(d))
    if df_d.rdd.isEmpty():
        continue

    df_p = (
        df_d.select(*(pivot_index + ["AttrID","Value"]))
            .groupBy(*pivot_index)
            .pivot("AttrID")
            .agg(F.first("Value"))
    )

    out = f"{output_base}/{defid_to_folder(d)}"
    (df_p.write.mode("overwrite").option("header", True).csv(out))
    print("Wrote:", out)
